mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM house WHERE status = '空房'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM house WHERE status = '已分配'
SELECT min_score FROM housing_standard WHERE #{area} > min_area AND #{area} <= max_area LIMIT 1
SELECT h.id, h.title, h.area, h.rent_per_m2, h.status, (h.area * h.rent_per_m2) AS monthly_rent FROM house h ORDER BY h.id

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_houses, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '空房' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS empty_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '已分配' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS allocated_count, SUM(area) AS total_area, AVG(rent_per_m2) AS avg_rent_per_m2 FROM house
